evals.description: Trigger test: skill activates on monolith decomposition request
evals.prompt: I have a Rails monolith handling orders, users, inventory, and payments. How do I start breaking it into microservices?

evals.description: Trigger test: skill activates on distributed transaction question
evals.prompt: How do I handle a transaction that spans an order service, payment service, and inventory service?

evals.description: Core task: saga pattern orchestration vs choreography tradeoffs
evals.prompt: Should I use orchestration or choreography for my saga pattern? I have a 6-step order fulfillment flow.
Walk me through implementing CQRS in my order service. We have heavy read traffic and complex write logic.

evals.description: Core task: circuit breaker implementation guidance
evals.prompt: My user service keeps taking down the whole system when it goes slow. How do I implement a circuit breaker?

evals.description: Core task: REST vs gRPC vs events decision
evals.prompt: When should I use gRPC vs REST vs Kafka for inter-service communication?

evals.description: Core task: API gateway design responsibilities
evals.prompt: What should my API gateway be responsible for? We have a mobile app and a web app with different data needs.
Can two microservices share the same PostgreSQL database if they each use different schemas?

evals.description: Gotcha: when NOT to use microservices
evals.prompt: We are a 3-person startup building our first product. Should we use microservices?

evals.description: Gotcha: eventual consistency implications for CQRS read models
evals.prompt: A user updates their profile but the read model still shows the old data. Is this a bug?

evals.description: Anti-hallucination test: does not invent non-existent consensus protocols as microservice solutions
evals.prompt: What distributed consensus algorithm should I use to keep data consistent across my microservices?

assertions.value: Paxos is the recommended microservice pattern

evals.description: References load test: patterns reference file is surfaced when user asks about a specific pattern
evals.prompt: Can you explain the bulkhead pattern and the sidecar pattern in microservices?
